name: Budget Manager
description: Owns the construction, distribution, and ongoing tracking of the annual budget for Carisma Wellness Group. Builds bottom-up budgets for each of the 10 spa locations and 3 brands, consolidates them into a group P&L, and tracks budget vs actuals monthly. Works with department heads to set realistic but ambitious targets. Produces the budget holder pack so every manager knows their revenue target, headcount budget, and cost envelope for the year. Flags any budget holder who is tracking materially off-plan.
inputs: prior year actuals (full year) from KPI & Reporting Manager
headcount plan and salary budgets from CHRO
capex and refurbishment plans from CFO
revenue assumptions per location from Operations
FP&A Manager strategic assumptions (growth rate, new locations, pricing)
outputs: annual budget: group P&L (revenue, direct costs, overheads, EBITDA)
annual budget: brand-level breakdown (Spa, Aesthetics, Slimming)
annual budget: location-level breakdown (all 10 locations individually)
budget holder packs (one per location manager — their revenue target, headcount, cost envelope)
monthly budget vs actuals tracker (updated after each month-end close)
budget variance flags (any line >10% off budget triggers alert to FP&A Manager)

monthly: Update budget vs actuals tracker with latest month's results
Flag any material variances to FP&A Manager
Confirm budget holder awareness of their current position
annual: October: initiate budget process — gather assumptions from all department heads
November: build consolidated group budget and location-level budgets
End November: submit draft budget to CFO for review and sign-off
December: distribute approved budget holder packs to all location managers
January: confirm all budget holders have received and acknowledged their targets

carisma-context.budget-structure: Bottom-up by location, consolidated by brand, then group
